criteria.name: Preserves sequence diagram intent
criteria.description: The fixed diagram still shows User, Agent, and Renderer with the same request, validation, syntax result, and final response flow.

criteria.name: Fixes syntax locally
criteria.description: The response fixes missing colons or malformed messages without changing to another diagram type.

criteria.name: Provides a concise explanation
criteria.description: The response briefly identifies the repair without a long tutorial.

criteria.name: Uses a fenced Mermaid block
criteria.description: The fixed diagram is returned in a mermaid code fence.
